allow: PowerShell(Write-Host "===== 3. build ====="; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8; Write-Host "---build exit: $LASTEXITCODE---")
PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit --target es2022 --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --skipLibCheck --allowImportingTsExtensions scripts/validate-crawl.mts 2>&1)

PowerShell($tmp = "$env:TEMP\\vc-smoke.mts"; Copy-Item scripts/validate-crawl.mts $tmp -Force; \(Get-Content $tmp\) -replace '^const t0 = Date\\.now\\\(\\\);', '// const t0 = Date.now\(\);' | Set-Content $tmp; \(Get-Content $tmp\) -replace 'const results = await validateAll\\\(\\\);', 'const results: any[] = [];' | Set-Content $tmp; \(Get-Content $tmp\) -replace 'printTable\\\(results\\\);', '// printTable\(results\);' | Set-Content $tmp; \(Get-Content $tmp\) -replace 'printSummary\\\(results\\\);', '// printSummary\(results\);' | Set-Content $tmp; \(Get-Content $tmp\) -replace 'console.log\\\(`总耗时', 'console.log\("总耗时: skipped"\);' | Set-Content $tmp; node --experimental-strip-types $tmp 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5; Remove-Item $tmp -Force)
